name: Jiangsu Sidike New Materials Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Sidike New Materials Science & Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells multifunctional coating composite material in China. It offers protective material, including computer and phone protective films; electronic grade adhesive materials, such as sided fixing and sided sealing material; functional coating material such as functional protective, conducting functional, insulation functional, shielding, and marked functional material; and film packaging material. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Suqian, China.
